metadata.note: Real-world-style farm parcel geometry near Pfungstadt, Hessen (EWIA / ESA BIC Hessen region). Parcel layout traced in the style of OpenStreetMap landuse=farmland ways. The target field is conventionally farmed; the parcel sharing its NORTH edge is a certified-organic field, so any spray drift across that legal boundary voids the neighbour's organic certification and triggers fines under the EU Sustainable Use Regulation and German PflSchG buffer-zone rules. Positions are simulated; the world (the boundary) is real geometry.

kind_legal_meaning.restricted_parcel: FORBIDDEN — organic neighbour, no drift allowed
kind_legal_meaning.legal_boundary: the line spray must never cross with chemical
